oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
now: Cutting the v0.14.0 release (scripts/publish.sh minor) so the renamed /tian skill + /tian implement ship to users via auto-install.
next: Optimize /tian implement parent↔child context duplication when tokens get scarce (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Renamed the skill /tian-cli → /tian and added the bundled /tian implement delegation script (with an idle-tracking false-success fix).
Restructured project docs into the docs/pm context system via /project-kit (status + ADRs + dashboard).
Released v0.13.0: `tian worktree create --base <ref>` and auto-install of bundled skills to ~/.claude/skills on app update.
